prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DBSRT40G-50PC-STD-YLLW-NCX Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 50pc Diamond Burr Bit Set for Rotary Tool 40 Grit Description: Tackle your next precision project with the 50pc Diamond Burr Bit Set for Rotary Tools – 40 Grit - a versatile and durable accessory kit for carving, grinding, sanding, and etching.

This universal set includes 50 high-quality diamond-coated round ball burrs in assorted sizes, perfect for detailed work on a wide range of materials. Whether you're working with ceramics, glass, stone, tile, wood, fiberglass, or other natural materials, these medium-grit bits offer controlled material removal for professional results.

Each bit features a 1/8" shank, compatible with most rotary tools including Dremel, so you can enhance your toolkit without worrying about fit. The durable 40 grit diamond coating provides long-lasting performance, even on tough surfaces.

To keep your workspace organized, the set comes in a compact, sturdy case - ideal for storage and transport. Whether you're a hobbyist or a professional, this burr bit set is a must-have for fine detail work across a variety of materials. Search Terms: diamond burr set, rotary tool bits, Dremel diamond bits, 1/8 inch shank burrs, diamond grinding bits, carving burr set, 40 grit burrs, rotary tool accessories, stone carving bits, glass etching tools, engraving burr set, Dremel accessories, burr bit kit Features: - UNIVERSAL ROTARY TOOL COMPATIBILITY - 1/8" shank fits most rotary tools, including Dremel, making it easy to upgrade your setup. - ASSORTED 50PC SET - Includes 50 diamond-coated round ball burrs in various sizes for versatile shaping, carving, and detailing tasks. - DURABLE 40 GRIT DIAMOND COATING - Medium grit ideal for controlled material removal on hard surfaces like stone, glass, ceramic, and tile. - MULTI-MATERIAL USE - Perfect for engraving, grinding, sanding, and etching on wood, fiberglass, natural stone, and more. - COMPACT STORAGE CASE - Comes in a sturdy, portable case to keep bits organized and protected when not in use. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
